---
title: "RNN"
author: "Yun Tsing"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Preparation
```{r, echo = False}

library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(lubridate)
library(keras3)
library(tensorflow)

df <- read_csv('data/final_data.csv')
```

```{r}

predict_alpha_rnn <- function(df){

  library(tidyverse)
  library(lubridate)
  library(caret)
  library(keras3)

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      caldt = as.Date(caldt),
      year = year(caldt)
    ) %>%
    arrange(year, crsp_fundno) %>%
    drop_na()

  feature_names <- df %>%
    select(-alpha_ann, -crsp_fundno, -caldt, -year) %>%
    colnames()

  results_rnn <- list()

  years <- sort(unique(df$year))
  start_year <- min(years)
  initial_train_end <- 2019

  if(!(2019 %in% years)){
    stop("Dataset must contain year 2019 for initial training window.")
  }

  for (t in (initial_train_end + 1):max(years)) {

    train_full <- df %>%
      filter(year >= start_year & year <= (t - 1))

    test_data <- df %>%
      filter(year == t)

    if (nrow(test_data) == 0) next

    tune_years <- sort(unique(train_full$year))
    split_index <- floor(0.7 * length(tune_years))

    train_years <- tune_years[1:split_index]
    valid_years <- tune_years[(split_index + 1):length(tune_years)]

    train_tune <- train_full %>%
      filter(year %in% train_years)

    valid_tune <- train_full %>%
      filter(year %in% valid_years)

    X_train <- train_tune %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    y_train <- train_tune$alpha_ann

    X_valid <- valid_tune %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    y_valid <- valid_tune$alpha_ann

    # scale
    scaler <- preProcess(X_train, method = c("center","scale"))
    X_train <- predict(scaler, X_train)
    X_valid <- predict(scaler, X_valid)

    n_features <- ncol(X_train)

    # reshape for RNN
    X_train <- array(X_train, dim = c(nrow(X_train),1,n_features))
    X_valid <- array(X_valid, dim = c(nrow(X_valid),1,n_features))

    units_grid <- c(16,32,64)

    best_units <- NULL
    best_mse <- Inf

    for(u in units_grid){

      model <- keras_model_sequential() |>
        layer_lstm(
          units = u,
          input_shape = c(1,n_features)
        ) |>
        layer_dense(units = 1)

      model |> compile(
        optimizer = "adam",
        loss = "mse"
      )

      model |> fit(
        X_train,
        y_train,
        epochs = 20,
        batch_size = 64,
        verbose = 0
      )

      preds <- model |> predict(X_valid)

      mse <- mean((y_valid - preds)^2)

      if(mse < best_mse){
        best_mse <- mse
        best_units <- u
      }
    }

    # refit on full window
    X_full <- train_full %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    y_full <- train_full$alpha_ann

    X_full <- predict(scaler, X_full)

    n_features <- ncol(X_full)

    X_full <- array(X_full, dim = c(nrow(X_full),1,n_features))

    final_model <- keras_model_sequential() |>
      layer_lstm(
        units = best_units,
        input_shape = c(1,n_features)
      ) |>
      layer_dense(units = 1)

    final_model |> compile(
      optimizer = "adam",
      loss = "mse"
    )

    final_model |> fit(
      X_full,
      y_full,
      epochs = 20,
      batch_size = 64,
      verbose = 0
    )

    X_test <- test_data %>%
      select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
      as.matrix()

    X_test <- predict(scaler, X_test)

    X_test <- array(X_test, dim = c(nrow(X_test),1,n_features))

    pred_rnn <- final_model |> predict(X_test)

    temp_rnn <- test_data %>%
      transmute(
        evaluation_year = year,
        crsp_fundno = crsp_fundno,
        predicted_alpha = as.numeric(pred_rnn)
      )

    results_rnn[[as.character(t)]] <- temp_rnn
  }

  rnn_df <- bind_rows(results_rnn)

  return(list(
    rnn_predictions = rnn_df
  ))
}
```

```{r}

result <- predict_alpha_rnn(df)

rnn_df <- result$rnn_predictions

```
